signals.headline: Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury in Ripple Treasury | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury in Ripple Treasury | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]  
This first-of-its-kind native digital asset integration embeds XRP and RLUSD balances alongside cash in a treasury management system with real-time valuation, announced recently and driving XRP's current price stability around $1.31 amid market recovery.[1]

signals.headline: US XRP ETFs Record $12M Net Inflows in April, First Green Month Since Sept 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
US XRP ETFs Record $12M Net Inflows in April, First Green Month Since Sept 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]  
After $31M outflows in March, April inflows signal institutional demand turnaround, with global ETPs adding $20M; XRP up over 2% to $1.35, outperforming amid retail FUD at 2-year highs.[2]

signals.headline: XRPL Deploys RISC-V ZK Verifier for On-Chain Programmable Privacy | YES | MED confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
XRPL Deploys RISC-V ZK Verifier for On-Chain Programmable Privacy | YES | MED confidence** [2]  
First public blockchain with built-in privacy/compliance via XRPL Commons and Boundless; staged rollout includes Q2 2026 Smart Escrows requiring ZK proofs, attracting Wall Street interest.[2]

signals.headline: Rakuten Integrates XRP into Wallet for 46M Japanese Users | YES | MED confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
Rakuten Integrates XRP into Wallet for 46M Japanese Users | YES | MED confidence** [2]  
Japanese e-commerce giant enables XRP purchases via loyalty points, boosting retail adoption in Asia alongside unverified reports of banks' XRP pilot vs. SWIFT (4s settlements at 60% lower cost).[2]

signals.headline: Ripple/Sherlock Launch $550K XRPL Audit Contest on April 13 | YES | LOW confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
Ripple/Sherlock Launch $550K XRPL Audit Contest on April 13 | YES | LOW confidence** [2]  
Targets infrastructure scaling for volume growth, supporting utility shift but lacking immediate resolution details.[2]
